title: Capital Budgeting: If a firm has a weighted average cost of capital...
summary: Calculate the NPV of a project by discounting cash flows at the cost of capital.
prompt: If a firm has a weighted average cost of capital (WACC) of 10% and is considering a project with an NPV of $50,000, what should the firm do?

options.text: According to the NPV rule, the firm should accept projects with a positive NPV,

solution: According to the NPV rule, the firm should accept projects with a positive NPV, indicating value creation.
